creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text: Can you fix the port to use ALL_TARGETS soon (rather than waiting for the next upgrade)?  I just tripped over this on the qemu-devel port.  I don't really care if it takes longer to build or not, I just care that I don't have a qemu-system-ppc64 binary to test powerpc64 changes with unless I set the checkbox that says "don't build non-x86 targets".
